## Summary
Describe what changed.

## Why
Explain the problem this solves.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Security-related

## Testing
List the commands and checks you ran.

## Screenshots (if UI changed)
Attach before/after screenshots when relevant.

## Breaking Changes
- [ ] No breaking changes
- [ ] Breaking change included (describe below)

## Security Considerations
- [ ] No security impact
- [ ] Security impact reviewed

If security-sensitive, follow SECURITY.md and avoid posting exploit details publicly.

## Checklist
- [ ] I followed CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] I linked related issue(s), if applicable
- [ ] I updated docs as needed
- [ ] I tested the changes locally
- [ ] I confirmed no secrets/credentials were added
